name: uid_pin_match: Windows service-account equivalence (5 unit tests for isIdentityMatch)
description: Bug B3 regression guard. Verifies that isIdentityMatch() (in uid_pin_match.js) correctly handles: (1) exact match, (2) COMPUTERNAME$ vs interactive-user on same machine (win32), (3) COMPUTERNAME$ on different machine → reject, (4) different humans → reject, (5) non-Windows platform skips service-account logic. Uses dependency injection (_platform, _hostname opts) for deterministic, platform-independent testing. Authority: DECISION-2026-05-20T10-00-stage-12-7-amendment-automated-installer.md §14 (Bug B3).
